title: Process of Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) in an Operating Systems Course
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of Continuous Internal Evaluation, showing how assessments inform teaching and learning adjustments.
relationships: Flow from Start to Formative Assessment
Flow from Evaluation to Feedback and Remedial Action (concurrently)
Feedback loop from Remedial Action back to teaching content
Flow from Feedback/Remedial to Summative Test
